caption: Table 91. Document revision history
rows: Added UFBGA100 package. Changed confidentiality level to public. Updated datasheet status to "production data". Modified ultra-low-power platform features on cover page. Changed LCD_VLCD1 into LCD_VLCD2 in Section 3.13.2: V LCD voltage monitoring. In Section 6: Electrical characteristics, updated notes related to values guaranteed by characterization. Updated |ΔV | definition to include V in Table 23: Voltage SS REF- characteristics. Added ΣV and updated ΣI in Figure 24: Current DD_USB IO(PIN) characteristics. Updated Table 56: EMI characteristics. Updated f and V maximum value, added V and V in TRIG AIN REF+ REF- Table 64: ADC characteristics. Updated Figure 56: UFQFPN48 marking example (package top view).

Updated number of SPIs on cover page and in Table 2: Ultra-low- power STM32L083xxx device features and peripheral counts. Changed minimum comparator supply voltage to 1.65 V on cover page. Added minimum DAC supply voltage on cover page. Added number of fast and standard channels in Section 3.12: Analog-to-digital converter (ADC). Updated Section 3.19.2: Universal synchronous/asynchronous receiver transmitter (USART) and Section 3.19.4: Serial peripheral interface (SPI)/Inter-integrated sound (I2S) to mention the fact that USARTs with synchronous mode feature can be used as SPI master interfaces. Added baudrate allowing to wake up the MCU from Stop mode in Section 3.19.2: Universal synchronous/asynchronous receiver transmitter (USART) and Section 3.19.3: Low-power universal asynchronous receiver transmitter (LPUART). Section 6.3.15: 12-bit ADC characteristics: – Table 64: ADC characteristics: Distinction made between V for fast and standard channels; DDA added note 1. Added note 4. related to R . ADC Updated f .. TRIG Updated t and t . S CONV – Updated equation 1 description. – Updated Table 65: R max for f = 16 MHz for f = 16 MHz AIN ADC ADC and distinction made between fast and standard channels. Updated R and added Note 2. in Table 67: DAC characteristics. O Added Table 71: USART/LPUART characteristics.

Memories and I/Os moved after Core in Features. Removed column "I/O operation" from Table 3: Functionalities depending on the operating power supply range and added note related to GPIO speed. Updated V in Section 3.4.1: Power supply schemes. DD_USB In Section 4: Pin descriptions, renamed USB_OE into USB_NOE. In Section 5: Memory mapping, replaced memory mapping schematic by reference to the reference manual. Added mission profile compliance with JEDEC JESD47 in Section 6.2: Absolute maximum ratings. Updated minimum and maximum values of I/O weak pull-up equivalent resistor (R ) and weak pull-down equivalent resistor PU (R ) in Table 60: I/O static characteristics. PD Updated minimum and maximum values of NRST weak pull-up equivalent resistor (R ) in Table 63: NRST pin characteristics. PU Added note 2. related to the position of the external capacitor below Figure 27: Recommended NRST pin protection. Updated R in Table 64: ADC characteristics. AIN Updated Figure 32: 12-bit buffered/non-buffered DAC and added note below figure. Updated t maximum value for range 1 in Table 73: I2C analog filter AF characteristics. Removed Table 90: USART/LPUART characteristics. NSS timing waveforms updated in Figure 33: SPI timing diagram - slave mode and CPHA = 0 and Figure 34: SPI timing diagram - slave mode and CPHA = 1(1). Updated Figure 48: TFBGA64 – 64-ball, 5 x 5 mm, 0.5 mm pitch thin profile fine pitch ball grid array package outline. Added reference to optional marking or inset/upset marks in all package device marking sections. Updated note below marking schematics.

Updated Arm logo and added Arm word mark notice in Section 1: Introduction. Removed Cortex logo. Updated Table 5: Functionalities depending on the working mode (from Run/active down to standby) to change I2C functionality to disabled in Low-power Run and Low-power Sleep modes. Updated V description in Section 3.4.1: Power supply DD_USB schemes. Replaced LCD_VLCD2 by LCD_VLCD1 in Section 3.13.2: V LCD voltage monitoring. Changed USARTx_RTS, USARTx_RTS_DE into USARTx_RTS/USARTx_DE, and LPUART1_RTS, LPUART1_RTS_DE into LPUART1_RTS/LPUART1_DE in Section 4: Pin descriptions and in all alternate function tables. In Table 16: STM32L083xx pin definition changed PB2 and PB12/PE11 additional functions to LCD_VLCD2 and LCD_VLCD1, respectively. Updated V and note 2. in Table 26: General operating DD_USB conditions. Removed R and R from Table 70: Comparator 1 10K 400K characteristics. Updated t maximum value for range 1 in Table 73: I2C analog filter AF characteristics. Updated paragraph introducing all package marking schematics to add the new sentence "The printed markings may differ depending on the supply chain." Updated Figure 48: TFBGA64 – 64-ball, 5 x 5 mm, 0.5 mm pitch thin profile fine pitch ball grid array package outline, Figure 49: TFBGA64 – 64-ball, 5 x 5 mm, 0.5 mm pitch, thin profile fine pitch ball ,grid array recommended footprint and Figure 87: TFBGA64 recommended PCB design rules (0.5 mm pitch BGA).
